text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon, a tiny mouse named Milly scampered across a giant pumpkin patch. Every day after school, Milly would return home to her cozy burrow filled with dusters made from wild feathers. She loved exploring the patch, nibbling on sweet orange berries, and singing tiny acorn melodies.

One day, while gathering nuts, Milly heard a peculiar giggle echoing amidst the leaves. She pressed softly upon an antique-looking vase beside a babbling brook. Suddenly, the vase spun mysteriously, revealing a glowing orb of luminescent pink.

Curiosity pried Milly away from the vase. What lay within it? She reached out and touched it. A dreamlike whisper filled her ears.

"You who wander lost in dreams," it said. "Find the heart of the forest, listen to the whispers of the wind, and you'll uncover wisdom beyond your kin's comprehension."
